nodes.name: Pipeline A: Process Demos
nodes.notes: Run extraction + agent spec generation for all demo transcripts. Produces v1 artifacts.

nodes.name: Pipeline B: Process Onboarding
nodes.notes: Run onboarding updates, produce v2 artifacts with changelogs.

nodes.name: Validate Outputs
nodes.notes: Check that all accounts have v1 and v2 artifacts

nodes.name: Flag Incomplete
nodes.notes: Alert for accounts missing v1 or v2
